dct_description_sm: Coordinates approximate and based on Greenwich meridian
Prime meridian: likely Ferro Islands. Not stated on map
Bar scale on map: "Miliaria German. com."
Shows rivers, ports, fortresses, tributaries, settlements, mountains, islands, and other features of the northern coast of Africa, Carthage, and the Nile Delta
Text on verso: Barbarie and Aegypte
